description: The NotepadApp project is open in Android Studio. The project compiles without errors, but the app crashes immediately on launch. A colleague reports the following from logcat: 'FATAL EXCEPTION: main — java.lang.UninitializedPropertyAccessException: lateinit property formatter has not been initialized'. Investigate the source code to identify and fix all runtime issues causing crashes so the app runs correctly. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'.
